description: Manual title overrides for GOODPRICE Title Intelligence V1 — products where the automatic generator produced incorrect or empty identifiers (FASE 5A analysis).

overrides.reason: Brand 'Vault X' present but title starts with '9 Pocket' (pure digit after brand) blocking productLine extraction. card-binder type not in vocabulary. Auto-generated benefit 'Movilidad y Confort' is wrong for a trading card binder.
overrides.amazonTitle: Vault X 9 Pocket Zip Binder, 360 Cards, Exo-Tec Material, 20 Side-Loading Pages (Black)
overrides.title: Vault X Zip Binder – Organización para tu Colección

overrides.reason: Model '952' is a pure numeric string — MODEL_PATTERN requires at least one letter. productLine extraction halts at the pure digit. Result 'HP – Rendimiento Profesional' loses the critical model number entirely.
overrides.amazonTitle: HP 952 Cyan, Magenta, Yellow Ink Cartridges (3-Pack) | Works with Printer Series: OfficeJet 8702, OfficeJet Pro 7720, 7740, 8210, 8710, 8720, 8730, 8740 | Eligible for Instant Ink | N9K27AN
overrides.title: HP 952 Cartuchos de Color – Colores Vibrantes para tu Impresora

overrides.reason: Same issue as ofic-004: model '962' is pure numeric. Both HP cartridge packs lose their model number and produce identical generic titles.
overrides.amazonTitle: HP 962 Cyan, Magenta, Yellow Ink Cartridges | Works with OfficeJet 9010, 9020 | Eligible for Instant Ink | 3YP00AN
overrides.title: HP 962 Cartuchos de Color – Resultados Profesionales en Casa

overrides.reason: No 'brand' field in catalog entry. extractBrandFromTitle() infers 'American Flag' from the title. Then productLine extraction picks up 'American Flags' producing the broken shortTitle 'American Flag American Flags'.
overrides.amazonTitle: American Flag Made in USA | American Flags for Outside 3X5 | Premium US Flag 3X5 Heavy Duty Outdoor with Embroidered Stars and Sewn Stripes
overrides.title: Bandera Americana 3x5 – Calidad que Perdura

overrides.reason: Product is a drawer/shelf liner, not a cooking tool. Category fallback benefit 'Cocinado Fácil y Rápido' is semantically wrong. No productType maps to shelf/drawer liners.
overrides.amazonTitle: GORILLA GRIP powerGRIP Drawer Shelf and Cabinet Liner, Thick Strong Hold, Non-Adhesive Liners Protect Kitchen Cabinets and Cupboard, Bathroom Drawers, Easy Install Mat, 12" x 20', Beige
overrides.title: Gorilla Grip powerGRIP – Cajones y Alacenas sin Deslizamientos
